## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated a failing test before production behavior.
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `./scripts/audit-public-repo.sh`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `./scripts/test-mac.sh`
- [ ] `node --test Evaluation/tests/*.test.cjs`
- [ ] iOS app and Action Extension simulator build, when relevant

## Public-data check

- [ ] No API key, signing material, populated `Local.xcconfig`, private book
      excerpt, private evaluation result, or raw provider response is included.
